collectionView.description: A record collection (lexicon type) present in the org's synced data, with a count of the records in it the calling user can see. A record scoped to more than one readable space is counted once per space, since each space holds its own version.

collection.description: The NSID of the record collection.

recordCount.description: Number of records in this collection the calling user can see, counted across all spaces they can read (once per space a record belongs to).

recordView.description: A single record scoped to one space. The same repo/collection/rkey in a different space is a distinct record with its own version, so it appears as its own recordView. The record body is not included; fetch it on demand from pear using the space, repo, collection and rkey.

uri.description: The space-record URI (spaceUri/repo/collection/rkey), unique to this record in this space.

space.description: URI of the space this record belongs to.

repo.description: DID of the repo the record lives in.

collection.description: The NSID of the record collection.
